Uses of Class
tif.DirectoryIFD

  • Packages that use DirectoryIFD 
    Package Description
    tif
    Classes for parsing and manipulating TIFF-based files.

      Retrieves a specific Image File Directory (IFD) by its identifier.

      Retrieves a DirectoryIFD from the container by identity.
      Methods in tif that return types with arguments of type DirectoryIFD 
      Modifier and Type Method Description

      Returns the list of IFD directories that were successfully parsed.

      Returns an iterator over all stored directories.
